title: Ordinance Approving the Supplemental Budget Amounting to Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (PHP 500,000.00 AS REWARD MONEY FOR THE EARLY APPREHENSION / CAPTURE OF THE PERPETRATORS IN THE KILLING OF HONORABLE MAYOR CAESAR P. PEREZ CHARGEABLE AGAINST THE 2020 SAVINGS (BEGINNING BALANCE) and Further Creating a Trust Fund for the Purpose. ( (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. B
